title: rhododendron dilatatum subsp. decandrum
intro: Rhododendron dilatatum subsp. decandrum, a lesser-known sub-species of the rhododendron family, is a shrub native to Taiwan, characterized by its unique flowers and medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues such as fever, sore throats, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rhododendron dilatatum subsp. decandrum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Rhododendron dilatatum subsp. decandrum can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
